title: Bridge Essay: The evolution of N, N-Dimethyltryptamine: from metabolic pathways to brain conne

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Liberation and enlightenment — ego dissolution, self-transcendence, psychedelic-induced mystical experience, spiritual awakening, enlightenment neuroscience.

**The evolution of N, N-Dimethyltryptamine: from metabolic pathways to brain connectivity.** — Psychopharmacology (Berl). PMID: 40210737. DOI: 10.1007/s00213-025-06777-z. N, N-Dimethyltryptamine (DMT), apotent serotonergic psychedelic, bridges ancient wisdom and modern science. The mechanisms underlying its powerful psychedelic effects and out-of-body experiences continue to intrigue scientists. The functional role of DMT remains ambiguous. This paper explores the endogenous presence of DMT in the human body and its diverse neuroregulatory functions, which influence hierarchical brain connectivity, and the mechanisms driving its psychedelic effects.
